publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2023-01-17 23:14:03 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.abstract: Subject files many of Henry W. Jeffers III, vice president of the company.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Subject files concerning fertilizer, milk products, and advertising; financial reports; minutes; alphabetical files, many of Henry W. Jeffers III, vice president of the company, including appointment calendars, cash payments and receipts, payrolls, reports, photographs, and other records.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Walker-Gordon Laboratory Company Records, #3150. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

accessrestrict.head: Access Restrictions:
accessrestrict.p: Access to material in Boxes 12, 27, 31, 35, 38, 44, 45, 47, 52, 55 relating to Henry W. Jeffers II and Henry W. Jeffers III restricted to the permission or their heirs.
